You know, do you feel like he's in the right spot? Is your gut telling you no way, bad energy? You gotta get him off the team. There's merit to trusting your gut. Obviously, when we look at the numbers, we wanna ask ourselves these questions, but you know, listen to your gut as well. So for when to cut setters, for setters there's quantitative, which is basically they're chronically missing their numbers for four plus weeks and not knowing why. Now you're gonna ask what's numbers, right? What's KPI? So KPI for sets is all gonna depend on the opportunity that you're giving them, okay? So it's really gonna be company by company.
